title: albizia subcoriaceum
intro: Albizia subcoriaceum, also known as the smooth Albizia or white silk tree, is a deciduous tree native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its small leaves and showy white flowers. The bark of the Albizia subcoriaceum tree is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Albizia subcoriaceum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Traditionally, the bark is prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water to create a medicinal tea, which is also used in herbal preparations for its therapeutic properties.
